examples: When you unbox it you'll find that it comes with an American plug.
Apple's announcement came a week after Amazon, a big online retailer, launched Amazon Unbox, its own film-download service, to mixed reviews.
And everything stops at Boxee HQ while we unbox the latest gadget to come out of Cupertino.
Amazon rents movies to users of PCs and TiVos via its Unbox service.
No surprises here, but Amazon has taken their fancy new Unbox video downloads store live, and it's looking... download-ey.
